name: io.github.arcadia-finance/mcp-server
title: Arcadia Finance
description: Manage concentrated liquidity positions on Uniswap and Aerodrome with automated rebalancing, compounding, yield optimization, and leverage.

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_BASE
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Base (8453). Falls back to public RPC if not set.

environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL_UNICHAIN
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Unichain (130). Falls back to public RPC if not set.

environmentVariables.name: PK
environmentVariables.description: Private key for dev-only signing (not for production).

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP listen port (default 3000). Only used when TRANSPORT=http.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_ORIGINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed Origin headers for CORS and DNS rebinding protection. Only used when TRANSPORT=http.

environmentVariables.name: RATE_LIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Max requests per minute per session (default 60). Only used when TRANSPORT=http.
